info.title: Vessel Arrival Declarations
info.description:
Vessel Arrival Declaration by IMO Number 
/imonumber/{imonumber}   GET

Last Vessel Arrival Declaration by Vessel Name 
/last/vesselname/{vesselname}  GET

Vessel Arrival Declaration by Vessel Name 
/vesselname/{vesselname}     GET

Vessel Arrival Declaration for Past ‘N’ Hours 
/pastNhours  GET

Vessel Arrival Declaration by Date 
/bydate  GET

Vessel Arrival Declaration by CallSign 
/callsign/{callsign}  GET

get.summary: Get latest vessel arrival declaration by vessel name
get.description: Provides the corresponding latest vessel arrival declaration information for the given vessel name. The data is updated every hour.

parameters.name: vesselname
parameters.description: Name of the vessel (1-35 chars, must match ^[0-9a-zA-Z-_. ']+$)

200.description: Latest vessel arrival declaration found for the provided vessel name.

purpose.description:
Purpose CSV field. The purpose field is a comma-separated value (CSV) field, where each value is a Yes(Y)/No(N) indicator in the following sequence:
1. Loading / Unloading Cargo
2. Loading / Unloading Passengers
3. Taking Bunker
4. Taking Ship Supplies
5. Changing Crew
6. Shipyard Repair
7. Offshore Support
8. Not Used
9. Other Afloat Activities

204.description: No results found for the provided request.

400.description: The rate limit has been exceeded, please try after sometime. / Input Constraint Violation One or more input parameters are not valid / Bad Request:Invalid request, Please try with valid resource

401.description: Invalid apikey has been passed, please try with valid one / Unauthorized:The authentication has failed, Please try with valid creds

403.description: Access Denied / Forbidden:Authentication has failed,please try with valid keys

404.description: Not Found:The requested resource not found, please check the uri

405.description: Invalid request passed,Please try with valid one. / Method not Allowed:Invalid method has been passed,please try with valid one.

411.description: Length Required:The request doesn't specify the content length

415.description: Unsupported Media Type:Please try with valid MIME Types

500.description: Something went wrong on the gateway / Internal Server Error:Please try after sometime

503.description: Service Unavailable:The requested service is currently unavailable, Please try after some time

504.description: Gateway Timeout:Did not get the response from the downstram systems
